list.title: Available elections
list.subtitle: Browse elections you're eligible for and cast your vote when the election is open.

messages.notOpen: This election is not open yet.
messages.alreadyVoted: You already voted in this election.
messages.vaultMissing: No local encrypted key vault was found for this election. Paste the backup JSON to continue.
messages.keyMismatch: The selected encrypted backup does not match this election's public encryption key.
messages.backupInvalid: Election key backup JSON is invalid.
messages.actionFailed: Unable to complete the election lifecycle action.

dialog.title: Publish election decryption key
dialog.subtitle: Unlock the encrypted private key locally, then publish it on-chain so everyone can decrypt ballots after voting ends.
dialog.backupPlaceholder: Paste the downloaded election-key JSON only if this browser does not already have the vault.

create.title: Create election
create.subtitle: A fresh election encryption keypair is generated in your browser. Only the public key is sent to the backend.
create.success: Election "{{title}}" created. Encrypted key backup downloaded. Public key fingerprint: {{fingerprint}}.

placeholders.title: Municipal Election 2026
placeholders.description: Describe the purpose and scope of this election.
placeholders.vaultPassword: Use a long unique password for this election key backup

errors.passwordMismatch: Vault password confirmation does not match.
errors.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.

detailsPage.descriptionFallback: No description was provided for this election.

errors.missingUuid: Election UUID is missing from the URL.
